[F. No. Q. 15018/22/2000-CPW] RAJNISHA KUMAR VAISH, Jt. Secy. Note :—The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number $.0. 728(E) dated 21st July, 1987 and subsequently amended vide :— $.0. 838(E), dated 23rd September, 1987, $.0. 989 (E), dated 17th November, 1987, S.0. 156 (E), dated 24th February, 1989, 5.0. 489(E), dated 17thMay, 1989, 5.0. 846 (E), dated 24th October, 1989, S.0. 375 (E), dated 26th April, 1990, S.0. 633(E), dated 31st August, 1994, 5.0. 54(E), dated 15th January, 1997, 5.0. 305(E) dated 7th April, 1997, $.0. 173 (E), dated9th March, 1998, 5.0. 1508(E), dated 27¢h July, 1998, 5.0. 454(E), dated 11thFebruary, 2000, $.0. 683, dated 23rd March, 2001 & 8.0. 820 (E), dated 2nd August, 2002, S.0. 1257(E) dated the 2nd December, 2002, 5.0. 462 (E) dated the 23d April, 2003, $.0. 598 (E) dated the 261h April, 2004. .
